response: guest i am stefan muller, seeking to join in2code in rosenheim as an apprentice for fachinformatiker für anwendungsentwicklung. guest i have a wirtschaftsschulabschluss and have discontinued my fachoberschule and abitur verschule. guest i am passionate about it and have worked on small python projects in the past. guest i am currently looking for a opportunity to learn and grow in a professional setting. guest i am inspired by the work of florian bröcker and am eager to contribute to in2code's projects. guest i am available to start at your convenience.
